titleStmt.title: SII 41.290: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 290. (A.R. No. 506 of 1905.) Jambukēśvaram, Tiruchirappalli Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District. On the east wall of the third prākarā in the Jambukēśvara temple at Tiruvānaikāval.

summary.p: Sale of dry land, measuring 1 vēli and odd for 2125 kāsu, by a kāṇi holder of Ichaṇaikkuṟai.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ śrīrājarājarājarāja = [Picture] devaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 6 tulānāyiṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu pradhamaiyum cevvāyk kiḻamaiyum peṟṟa coti nāḷ pāṇṭikulācaṉi vaḷanāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tiruvāṉaikkāvuṭaiya
nāyaṉār koyil Āticaṇṭeśvara tevarkaṉmikaḷukku vaṭakarai rājarājarājarāja = [Picture]vaḷa nāṭṭu pācciṟ kūṟṟattu kiḻpalāṟṟu Icaṇaikkuṟaikkāṇiuṭaiya pālaiyuṭaiyāṉ perumāṉ kaṇṇaṉeṉ puṉcey nilavilai pramā
ṇa Icaivutiṭṭuk kuṭutta paricāvatu Icaṇaikuṟait talaikkuṟaiyil nāṉ viṟkiṉṟa nilattukku Icainta kiḻpāṟkellai piṭāri melai Oḻukkaiyil melaivelikku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai ciṟṟāṟṟu
nīroṭukālukku vaṭakkum mīpāṟkellai Āḻvār cāttaṅkuṭaiyār Arintavaṉ viḻupparayar nilattukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai vaṭavāṟṟu niroṭu kālukkutteṟkum Āka Iṉṉāṉkellaiyuḷ naṭuvup
paṭṭa rūpāy 1mākāṇi Iṉṉilam Oṉṟemākkāṇiyum Iṟṟaināḷāl viṟṟukkuṭuttukkoḷvatāṉa Emmilicainta vilaipporuḷ Aṉṟāṭu naṟkācu 2 1000 100 2 10 5 Ikkācu Iraṇṭāyirattu Oru nūṟṟirupattaiñcu
m Āvaṇakkaḷariye kāṭṭeṟṟik kaiccelavaṟakkoṇṭu viṟṟu vilaipramāṇa Icaivutiṭṭukkuṭutteṉ Āticaṇṭeśvara tevarkaṉmikaḷukku pālaiuṭaiyāṉ perumāṉ kaṇṇaṉeṉ Iṉ
ṉilam Oṉṟe mākāṇikkum Ikkācu Iraṇṭāyirattoru nūṟṟirupatteñcume vilaiyāvutākavum Ituve poruḷmāvaṟitip poruṭcelavolaiyāvutākavum Ituvallatu
veṟu poruḷmāvaṟutip poruṭcelavolaikkāṭṭakkaṭavatallāttākavum Iṉṉilattu meṉokkiṉa maraṅkaḷum kiḻnokkiṉa kiṇaṟukaḷum keṇikaḷum maṉaiyum maṉaippaṭap(pa)paiyum potuvum
potātiyum maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭa Urimaikaḷum Akappa(pā)ṭa mikuti kuṟaivu Uḷḷaṭaṅka nilam Oṉṟe mākāṇikkum Ivarkaḷ veṉummeṉṟa pote pramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭukka kaṭaveṉākavum kuṭuttile
nākil Inta pramāṇaicaivuttiṭṭepramāṇamāvutākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu vilai vilaikkuṟaviṟṟup poruḷaṟakkoṇṭuviṟṟu vilaipramāṇa Icaivuttiṭṭukkuṭutteṉ Uṭaiyār tiruvāṉaikkāvuṭaiya nāya
ṉṉāṟ koyil Āticaṇṭeśvara kaṉmikaḷukku pālaiyūṭaiyāṉ perumāṉ kaṇṇaṉeṉ Ippaṭikku Ivai pālaiyuruṭaiyāṉ kaṇṇaṉ sayiñai Āṉamaikku Ivvūr Ūṟkaṇakku va
ṭakuṭaiyāṉ kaṇakku koṭṭuruṭaiyāṉ kūṟṟutaittāṉāṉa poṉṉampalakkūttaṉeḻuttu Itu vaṇṭaluṭaiyāṉ Aḻakāṇṭāṉ Aṟivu sayiñaikkum Ippaṭi Aṟivukkum Ivai miṅkiḷināṭṭu ve
ḷāṉeṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ viḻupparaiyaṉeṉ Itu periyaṉāṭṭu paramaṉāṉa pūvaṉamuṭaiyāṉ Aṟivu sayiñaikkum Ippaṭi Aṟivukkum kuraṇṭiyuṭaiyāṉ
periyāṉ ñcaṉe Aṟiveṉ Ivai Arayaṉ mūvāyirattaccaṉeḻuttu Itu kaḻaṉivāyiluṭaiyāṉ Aṟivu sayiñaikku Ivai micaṅkiḷi nāṭṭu veḷāṉeḻuttu Ippaṭi
Aṟiveṉ Ivai maṇaṟkuṭaiyāṉ tiru yāṉ Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 41.290 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
